calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2012 Off Calendar

AMENDED DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-27-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Alan J. Zacharin, Esq., of the Law Offices of Alan J. Zacharin, Tel. 510.508.9702, appearing for Defendant and moving party.
Mary Prater, plaintiff and opposing party appearing on her own behalf.

RULING: A R G U E D. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS BRENDA KYNE and SUTTER WEST BAY HOSPITALS DBA CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained without leave to amend as to all causes of action. The complaint fails to allege actionable defamation of any kind, and further amendment cannot reasonably cure this defect. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Maria Viscio, CSR #12353

AMENDED MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-27-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Alan J. Zacharin, Esq., of the Law Offices of Alan J. Zacharin, Tel. 510.508.9702, appearing for Defendant and moving party.
Mary Prater, plaintiff and opposing party appearing on her own behalf.

RULING: A R G U E D. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS BRENDA KYNE, SUTTER WEST BAY HOSPITALS DBA CALIFORNIA AMENDED MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Off calendar in light of the ruling on the demurrer. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Maria Viscio, CSR #12353

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-17-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS BRENDA KYNE and SUTTER WEST BAY HOSPITALS DBA CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Continued to February 27, 2012 per the amended notice. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Off Calendar Feb-17-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS BRENDA KYNE and SUTTER WEST BAY HOSPITALS DBA CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Continued to February 27, 2012 per the amended notice. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Alan J. Zacharin, Esq., Law Office, 510-508-9702, for defendants and moving party
Mary Prater, 415-407-6466, Plaintiff and opposing party in Pro Per

Discussed and the Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS BRENDA KYNE AND SUTTER WEST BAY HOSPITALS DBA CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained with ten days leave to amend. No opposition filed.
Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Alan J. Zacharin, Esq., Law Office, 510-508-9702, for defendants and moving party
Mary Prater, 415-407-6466, Plaintiff and opposing party in Pro Per

Discussed and the Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS BRENDA KYNE AND SUTTER WEST BAY HOSPITALS DBA CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER'S
MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is Granted with ten days leave to amend. No opposition filed. Ms. Prater's email "opposition" was untimely, not submitted in accordance with applicable rules and was not considered. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077
